subcodes.first_line: O thou who art attracted to the Kingdom! The decoration and adornment of the tongue consists in praising and thanksgiving to the Lord Almighty
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای منجذب بملکوت زینت و آرایش لسان بمحامد و نعوت حضرت یزدان است علی الخصوص
subcodes.subjects: @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @praise and encouragement, @thankfulness; gratitude, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @education of children; moral education, @teaching the Cause; call to teach
